text: The main road near Government High School is full of potholes. Students and ambulances face difficulty during the rainy season.
Our Primary Health Centre has only one doctor for five villages. Patients wait for hours and emergency cases suffer.
The government school has leaking roofs and broken toilets. Children cannot attend classes during heavy rain.
There is no regular drinking water supply in our village. Families depend on tankers every summer.
Power cuts happen every evening for three to four hours, affecting students and small businesses.
Overflowing drains and uncollected garbage are causing mosquito breeding and health issues.
Farmers are facing severe water shortages for irrigation, resulting in crop losses this season.
Street lights are not working near the market area. Women feel unsafe while returning home after sunset.
The only bus to our village runs twice a day. Students and workers struggle to reach the city on time.
Our panchayat office has poor internet connectivity, making access to online government services difficult.
